metadata.description: Knowledge-Ops marketplace: the horizontal, cross-company operations layer that sits above founder-os. Data room assembly, due diligence / board / audit packaging, and file & workspace custody.

plugins.name: knowledge-ops
plugins.description: Cross-company OPS suite. Four skills: dataroom-ops (build & maintain the canonical data room from founder-os outputs), diligence-ops (package it for investors, due diligence, board, audit - stage-adaptive, Swiss venture), knowledge-custodian (organize files & workspaces and infer the de-facto org, advice-only in v1.0), functional-hr-ops (design team & org structure, plan workforce, run hiring, roll out org change).
